article.title: Seth Troxler: A Young Force in Techno
article.subtitle: Detroit Roots and Berlin Success Define Emerging Talent
article.author: A. Stern
article.excerpt: Seth Troxler's achievements far outweigh his tender age of 22. His Detroit roots are unmistakable and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene.

content.text: Seth Troxler's achievements far outweigh his tender age of 22. His Detroit roots are unmistakable and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene.

Seth's musical influences include the chirping of crickets, the whirring of space ships, and the sweet sounds of whistling voodoo magic. With releases on revered labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair and M_NUS, each join the dots of his distinctive techno sound.

His recent releases include This Is Then, DJ-Kicks (Seth Troxler) [DJ Mix], Mixmag Presents Seth Troxler: The Illusion Nouveau (DJ Mix), Mixmag Presents Jamie Jones vs. Seth Troxler, and Love Never Sleeps.

Seth Troxler's work is characterized by a blend of techno, minimal, and minimal techno styles, reflecting both his Detroit heritage and his current position within the Berlin electronic music landscape.
